audit_summary: Full-stack operational audit of Indigo Yield Platform v01 identified critical workflow failure in admin asset management due to missing RLS policies, along with security header gaps. Application is functional but requires immediate RLS policy deployment to restore core admin functionality.
whats_working: All Supabase services healthy (Database, Storage, Auth, Realtime)
35+ routes properly mapped with admin/LP role separation
Authentication flows working correctly with Supabase Auth
React + Vite + shadcn/ui component architecture properly structured
HSTS, Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy security headers configured
RLS enforcement on investor tables per project rules
Admin-only operations properly restricted for deposits/withdrawals/interest

critical_issues.issue: addAssetsToInvestor workflow failing - admin cannot add assets to investor portfolios
critical_issues.root_cause: Missing RLS insert policy on portfolios table blocking admin operations
critical_issues.fix_provided: sql_fix_file: CREATE POLICY 'Admin can insert portfolios for any user' with admin-only INSERT permissions and audit triggers

critical_issues.issue: Missing X-Frame-Options header exposing clickjacking vulnerability
critical_issues.root_cause: Security header not configured in vercel.json
critical_issues.fix_provided: vercel_config_diff: Added 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' header to vercel.json headers array

critical_issues.issue: CSP allows unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval reducing XSS protection
critical_issues.root_cause: Content Security Policy overly permissive for inline scripts
critical_issues.fix_provided: Recommendation to implement nonce-based script execution - no fix delivered yet

critical_issues.issue: No error handling or user feedback when mutations fail silently
critical_issues.root_cause: InvestorAssetDropdown component lacks proper error UI feedback
critical_issues.fix_provided: Enhanced error handling recommended - implementation pending

critical_issues.issue: Hardcoded fallback Supabase URL and anon key in client.ts
critical_issues.root_cause: Fallback values hardcoded instead of using environment variables only
critical_issues.fix_provided: Remove hardcoded fallbacks and enforce environment variables - pending implementation

critical_issues.issue: Multiple Sentry initialization files causing potential conflicts
critical_issues.root_cause: Duplicate implementations in lib/sentry.ts and utils/monitoring/sentry.ts
critical_issues.fix_provided: Consolidate to single implementation - refactor recommended

critical_issues.root_cause: Duplicate implementations in lib/posthog.ts and utils/analytics/posthog.ts

other_fixes: Added audit trail triggers for created_by/updated_by tracking on portfolios table
Enhanced RLS policies for SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE operations on portfolios
Added GRANT permissions for authenticated role on portfolios table
Included helpful policy comments for maintenance

compliance_checklist.requirement: RLS enforced for all investor and asset tables with least-privilege policies
Secrets not exposed in client; environment separation respected
Error handling with user-visible feedback and logged server errors
Observability with logs/traces/alerts active for production
CI/CD parity between preview and production environments
Data protection with PII minimized and encrypted in transit
Third-party integrations with configured keys and validated webhooks

deliverables.description: Comprehensive audit findings in structured JSON format with severity ratings
Executive summary with prioritized recommendations and deployment readiness assessment
SQL migration to fix addAssetsToInvestor workflow with RLS policies and audit triggers
Updated configuration with X-Frame-Options security header added
Progress tracking document with infrastructure assessment and route mapping

error_handling_guidance: If RLS policy deployment fails: (1) Verify admin user context with SELECT auth.uid() and profiles.is_admin check, (2) Run migration in transaction with ROLLBACK checkpoint, (3) Test with minimal INSERT to portfolios table before full deployment. For header issues: validate vercel.json syntax, deploy to preview first, check response headers with curl -I. If mutations still fail post-fix: enable Supabase query logging, capture RLS denial codes (42501), add console.error() to InvestorAssetDropdown handleAddAsset catch block, implement toast notifications for user feedback. For unknown failures: rotate Supabase service keys, validate CORS origins in Supabase dashboard, implement exponential backoff with 3 retries max.
